steps.title: Refer back to daytime
steps.content: The first sentence says poisonous amphibians can migrate during the day. The second explains what happens with the sun in the sky: their warning colors deter daytime predators. The transition should point back to that time.

steps.title: Choose the temporal link
steps.content: Choice B would introduce an example, Choice C would restate the prior sentence, and Choice D would signal contrast. The second sentence instead explains daytime protection. The answer is A.
